title: Drodi's Illagers
description: Reimagined Illagers with new models, textures, and unique features!
body:
# Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 

Drodi’s Illagers aims to remake and expand upon Illagers by reimagining them from the ground up: new models, fresh textures, variations and extra features!

Drodi’s Illagers was my first project and my introduction to making resource packs. It has slowly grown into much more, and I hope to keep maintaining it and adding more content.

Currently, the main features are:
- Complete visual overhauls for all Illagers (Vex excluded)
- Special attack animation for the Evoker
- One-of-a-kind Illager variants to discover
- Custom Pillager captain variants
- Snowy Pillagers, Vindicators and Evokers
> A remake of this resource pack is in the works, with Desert variations being the next big feature!

For [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatibility, use [**Drodi's Illagers x Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-illagers-fresh-animation)- please make sure to read the instructions before using it!

<details>
<summary>OFFICIAL SOURCES</summary>

The OFFICIAL versions of my resource packs are available on the following platforms:  
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) under the profile @Drodi  
- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/) under the profile Drodi  
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects) under the profile Dordinatteur  

Downloads from any other sources may be unsafe and could contain viruses or malware. Use them at your own risk.  

If you find someone reuploading my resource packs without permission and it is possible to take action, please contact me on Discord: drodi99.

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>CREDITS</summary>

- Keniu & Rustillery → Inspiration from their packs "Illagers Reborn" and "Rustillery’s Classy Illagers"  
- Shrimpsnail → Help with the Witch design + made the Witch’s cauldron  
- Blockixel Artistry → Heavy inspiration for the Iceologer design  
- Reijvi → General inspiration for the pack’s style  

</details>
